role: Review diff independently, detect bugs, scope drift, and inconsistencies
summary: Self-review of diff found a critical latent bug: validate-orchestrations.ps1 contained UTF-8 em-dashes inside double-quoted strings; under PS 5.1 CP1252 misread the byte 0x94 becomes U+201D which PowerShell accepts as a string terminator, and the residual dot-quote swallowed the validation loop, making the validator a silent no-op since PR 180. Fixed by replacing em-dashes with ASCII hyphens; validator now iterates manifests and the negative case fails as expected.
